reasoning: As I only have access to base rate information given a future knowledge cutoff (Nov 2025) and no web search functionality to get real-time odds, I must rely on the priori base rate of an NFL team winning the Super Bowl. A uniform baseline is 1/32 (~3.1%). The Philadelphia Eagles are historically a successful, well-managed franchise with a long-term franchise quarterback, generally placing them in the upper half or top tier of NFL teams. Thus, their a priori odds are moderately higher than average, estimated around 6-7%.
